body.raw:
{
    "name": "Manager",
    "teamId": "{{teamId}}",
    "permissions": [
        "company:read",
        "employee:manage",
        "team:manage",
        "role:manage",
        "payroll:manage",
        "attendance:manage",
        "leave:manage"
    ],
    "notifications": [] // EMPLOYEE_ADDED, EMPLOYEE_TERMINATION_RESIGNATION, ROLE_CREATED, TEAM_CREATED, RESOURCE_UPLOADED, PROBATION_REVIEW_DUE, WALLET_TOP_UP, SALARY_DISBURSEMENT
}
